CustomField.formula:
HYPERLINK("/"+ Id , IF(!ISBLANK(Image_1_URL__c),
IMAGE( Image_1_URL__c + $Organization.Id + "&dpt=null&viewId=", "Test",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_1_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c) - 1)) * 0.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_1_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_1_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c))))* 0.5),IMAGE( "https://fimby.file.force.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_PNG&versionId=068OL0000070F6H&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOL0000093ZEJ&page=0&d=/a/OL000004AQzp/sADXk_xAd38TtaqqIBlJDuG86pNzwAVhxD_EglFUVII&oid=00D5f000006NDkr", "Default image", 100, 100 )),"_top")
CustomField.label: List Image
